update: {
  prefix: {
    origin: "openconfig"
  }
  update: {
    path: {
      elem: { name: "oam" }
      elem: { name: "cfm" }
      elem: { name: "domains" }
      elem: {
        name: "maintenance-domain"
        key: {
          key: "domain-name"
          value: "domain3"
        }
      }
      elem: { name: "maintenance-associations" }
      elem: {
        name: "maintenance-association"
        key: {
          key: "association-name"
          value: "30"
        }
      }
      elem: { name: "mep-endpoints" }
      elem: {
        name: "mep-endpoint"
        key: {
          key: "mep-id"
          value: "5"
        }
      }
      elem: { name: "pm-profiles" }
      elem: {
        name: "pm-profile"
        key: {
          key: "profile-name"
          value: "cfm_delay_Port-Channel4-cfm_loss_Port-Channel4"
        }
      }
      elem: { name: "state" }
      elem: { name: "loss-measurement-state" }
      elem: { name: "far-end-average-frame-loss-ratio" }
    }

    }
  }
}
